macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stocks Slide After Hot PPI Inflation Data
items.summary: The Dow Jones fell 0.5%, S&P 500 dropped 0.3%-1.36%, and Nasdaq declined 0.4%-1.46% on Wednesday amid hotter-than-expected PPI inflation readings. Markets reacted ahead of the Federal Reserve's policy decision, with oil prices surging to $108/barrel Brent due to Iran tensions.

items.title: Fed Holds Rates Steady, Flags Inflation Risks from Oil Spike
items.summary: The Federal Reserve kept rates unchanged in the 3.5%-3.75% range and projected one rate cut in 2026, with Chair Powell highlighting upside inflation risks from February PPI and rising oil prices amid Iran-Israel tensions. Powell noted some progress on inflation but conditional forecasts tied to economic performance.

items.title: Powell Pauses as Markets Hit New Lows Post-Fed Decision
items.summary: Major indices sold off sharply after the Fed held rates: S&P 500 down 1.36% to ~6625, Nasdaq down 1.46%, Dow and Russell 2000 also declined amid hotter PPI and oil surge. Sector heat map showed broad declines with exceptions in tech like Intel (+2.2%) and utilities.

items.title: Markets Brace for Fed Amid Accelerating Inflation and Oil Shock
items.summary: Investors awaited Fed's Summary of Economic Projections and Powell's comments on oil-driven inflation, with Brent crude at $108 and WTI near $98 following attacks on Iranian facilities. Upcoming earnings include Micron Technology after close, plus General Mills and Macy's.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: SEC and CFTC Classify 16 Crypto Assets as Digital Commodities
items.summary: On March 17, 2026, the SEC and CFTC issued a joint 68-page release naming Bitcoin, Ether, Solana, XRP, Dogecoin, Cardano, and 10 others as digital commodities, not securities, clarifying protocol mining and staking. This follows a March 11 MOU for coordinated oversight.

items.title: Bitcoin Drops to $70,900 in 'Sell the News' Pattern After Fed Meeting
items.summary: Bitcoin fell from $74,000 to $70,900 on March 18 following the Fed's rate decision, confirming the sell-the-news pattern for the 8th time in 9 meetings. Potential recovery trough expected March 19-20 if it holds above $68,000.

items.title: SEC Approves Nasdaq Tokenized Equities Trading Pilot
items.summary: The SEC has approved a Nasdaq pilot for tokenized equities trading, advancing the integration of traditional finance with blockchain infrastructure. Ethereum price at $2,180.19, down 6.41%.

items.title: Connecticut Suspends Bitcoin Depot License Over Excessive Fees
items.summary: Connecticut regulators suspended Bitcoin Depot's license due to excessive fees, highlighting ongoing state-level enforcement in the crypto sector.

items.title: South Korea Fines Major Crypto Exchange $24.6M for AML Failures
items.summary: In March 2026, South Korean regulators fined a major crypto exchange $24.6 million and imposed a six-month partial suspension for anti-money laundering and verification issues. Global crypto firms prioritize verification accuracy amid rising regulatory pressure.

items.title: US Regulators Shift Stance on Crypto Assets, Boosting Bitcoin and Ethereum
items.summary: US regulatory clarity reduces uncertainty, benefiting Bitcoin as the top asset and Ethereum for DeFi, while intensifying competition among infrastructure cryptos and advancing tokenization trends.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Moonshot AI Introduces Attention Residuals to Boost LLM Training Efficiency by 25%
items.summary: Moonshot AI unveiled Attention Residuals (AttnRes), a novel architectural method that replaces standard residual connections with attention mechanisms, enabling models to achieve performance equivalent to 1.25x baseline compute. The innovation addresses the 'PreNorm dilution' problem in deep Transformer architectures and has been praised by industry leaders including Elon Musk and OpenAI's Jerry Tworek.

items.title: Universal Robots and Scale AI Launch UR AI Trainer for Lab-to-Factory AI Model Training
items.summary: Universal Robots unveiled the UR AI Trainer at GTC 2026, developed with Scale AI, marking the industry's first direct lab-to-factory solution for AI model training. The system enables high-fidelity, synchronized multimodal data capture for training Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models on production robots.

items.title: NVIDIA Launches Nemotron 3 with Hybrid Transformer-Mamba Architecture
items.summary: NVIDIA released Nemotron 3, an open-weight model family featuring a hybrid Transformer and Mamba architecture designed for agentic workloads. The launch coincides with the formation of the Nemotron Coalition, a strategic partnership including Mistral AI, Perplexity, LangChain, and Cursor.

items.title: NetraMark Unveils AI-Discovered Treatment-Responsive Subgroups in Alzheimer's Research
items.summary: NetraMark demonstrated how advanced AI can identify treatment-responsive subgroups in Alzheimer's trials, supporting precision enrichment strategies for future clinical research.

items.title: NERSC Issues 2026 Call for AI for Science Proposals
items.summary: The National Energy Research Scientific Computing Center (NERSC) opened a call for proposals to leverage the Perlmutter supercomputer for AI for science projects, offering up to 10,000 GPU node hours and 20,000 CPU node hours per project through January 2027.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Octavian Gaming Titles Launch with Novibet in Mexico
items.summary: Octavian Gaming has launched its high-quality game portfolio on Novibet, a prominent platform in Mexico. This partnership expands access to Octavian's titles in the region.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Tait Communications Launches OpenTrunk Shared Control Channel Solution
items.summary: Tait Communications announced the Tait OpenTrunk shared control channel solution based on DMR Tier 3 technology for spectrum-constrained industries like education, security, and transportation. The solution is showcased at IWCE 2026 in Las Vegas and available from April 1.

items.title: 7th Software-Defined Vehicle Forum and AUTOSAR China Day Held in Jiading
items.summary: The event drew over 600 attendees from automakers, suppliers, and chipmakers to discuss software-defined vehicles and launch the 'Common Source, Shared Chain' initiative for cross-industry synergy in automotive, intelligence, and low-altitude economy sectors.

items.title: IONNA Celebrates Second Anniversary with 100+ Charging Sites Live and GM Discount Program
items.summary: EV charging joint venture IONNA, backed by eight automakers including BMW and GM, reached over 100 live sites and launched its first automaker discount program with General Motors. New sites and an Amazon Just Walk Out convenience store are in development.
